title: antidesma pentandrum var. hiiranense
intro: Antidesma pentandrum var. hiiranense is a variant of the Antidesma pentandrum plant species, commonly known as a type of medicinal plant in traditional medicine. This plant is used for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can be used to treat wounds, skin conditions, and infections. The health benefits of Antidesma pentandrum var. hiiranense include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource in traditional medicine. In terms of herbal preparations, the plant can be used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
